allow: Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import fs from ''node:fs''; const html = fs.readFileSync\(''./index.html'', ''utf8''\); for \(const id of [''privacyAuditDialog'',''visaoEmptyState'',''extratoEmptyState'',''lancamentosEmptyState'',''mobileTabSelect'',''lancamentosExportCsvBtn'']\) { if \(!html.includes\(id\)\) throw new Error\(''Missing '' + id\); } console.log\(''HTML IDs OK''\); const css = fs.readFileSync\(''./css/styles.css'', ''utf8''\); if \(/table\\s*\\{[^}]*min-width:\\s*720px/i.test\(css\)\) throw new Error\(''Global mobile 720px table rule still present''\); console.log\(''CSS check OK: sem table min-width 720px global''\);")
